youtube_channels_research.method: Direct channel analysis via manual verification

top_poker_vloggers_identified.subscriber_est: 10K-100K range (based on typical mid-tier poker content)

key_insights: Poker vloggers typically post 1-3 videos per week
Most use DaVinci Resolve or Premiere Pro for editing
Common pain points: tracking board cards, editing long sessions, adding HUD overlays
Video length: 15-45 minutes for tournament recaps
Thumbnail quality and card readability are critical for engagement
